description_long: This object consists of two cylindrical pillar candles of different heights placed side by side. Each candle has a smooth, matte surface with a pale beige or off-white color, and both feature a visible wick at the center of the top surface. The wicks are topped with stylized, flame-shaped elements, suggesting that the candles are lit. The candles have flat tops and bottoms, with no visible wax drips or melted areas, giving them a clean and unused appearance. There are no holders or bases; the candles rest directly on their flat bottoms. The overall design is simple and modern, suitable for decorative use in urban environments such as cafes, patios, or event spaces.
description: A pair of smooth, beige pillar candles with visible wicks and stylized flames, placed side by side without holders. Their clean, modern look makes them ideal for tabletop decoration.
description_view_0: Two pillar candles of different heights, both with visible wicks and stylized flames, are seen side by side with the shorter candle in front.
description_view_1: The taller candle is more prominent, with both flames visible and the shorter candle slightly behind to the left.
description_view_2: The candles are viewed from the back, showing their cylindrical shapes and both flames, with the taller candle on the left.
description_view_3: The taller candle is on the left and the shorter on the right, both flames clearly visible and the smooth surfaces unobstructed.
